verses.1: Sing to the LORD a new song; Sing to the LORD, all the earth.
verses.2: Sing to the LORD, bless His name; Proclaim the good news of His salvation from day to day.
verses.3: Tell of His glory among the nations, His wonderful deeds among all the peoples.
verses.4: For great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised; He is to be feared above all gods.
verses.5: For all the gods of the peoples are idols, But the LORD made the heavens.
verses.6: Splendor and majesty are before Him, Strength and beauty are in His sanctuary.
verses.7: Ascribe to the LORD, you families of the peoples, Ascribe to the LORD glory and strength.
verses.8: Ascribe to the LORD the glory of His name; Bring an offering and come into His courtyards.
verses.9: Worship the LORD in holy attire; Tremble before Him, all the earth.
verses.10: Say among the nations, “The LORD reigns; Indeed, the world is firmly established, it will not be moved; He will judge the peoples fairly.”
verses.11: May the heavens be joyful, and may the earth rejoice; May the sea roar, and all it contains;
verses.12: May the field be jubilant, and all that is in it. Then all the trees of the forest will sing for joy
verses.13: Before the LORD, for He is coming, For He is coming to judge the earth. He will judge the world in righteousness, And the peoples in His faithfulness.
